---
title: "Faculty and APP Phone Numbers"
category: "Contact Information"
section_id: "faculty-app-numbers"
last_updated: "2026-07-01"
source: "UF Neurology Resident Handbook 2026-2027"
---

# Faculty and APP Phone Numbers

| Hedkte | 612-968-8754 |
| Hess | 718-986-3297 |
| Jaffee | 210-316-6753 |
| Kalamangalam | 713-805-7148 |
| Khanna | 732-742-5666 |
| Maciel | 917-355-2504 |
| Malaty | 352-682-3718 |
| McFarland, N | 352-327-1359 |
| Montalvo | 401-316-0906 |
| Nadeau | 352-514-5611 |
| Okun | 352-262-6314 |
| Page | 912-682-5675 |
| Patel | 317-869-5656 |
| Peng | 617-599-5602 |
| Pizzi | 850-559-4402 |
| Ramirez-Zamora | 312-972-3475 |
| Rawls | 352-422-6361 |
| Rempe | 929-284-8052 |
| Remz | 561-568-9098 |
| Roach | 352-222-7730 |
| Robinson | 304-646-4613 |
| Ruffing | 941-809-0658 |
| Shuhaiber | 312-286-1059 |
| Shukla | 501-213-6201 |
| Singh | 301-538-5096 |
| Smith | 954-654-0229 |
| Solomon | 910-315-9595 |
| Subramony | 601-750-1605 |
| Triggs | 352-262-8690 |
| Wang | 203-843-8250 |
| Wilson | 215-820-5120 |
| Wong | 424-237-5446 |
| Wymer | 518-928-2065 |
| Yehya | 614-804-8054 |
| Yu | 512-364-3661 |

| **Inpatient A****P****Ps** |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Holder (Stroke) | 352-494-6924 | Purtlebaugh (Stroke) | 352-339-1741 |
| Kenworthy (Stroke) | 352-682-9365 | Schurer (General) | 904-504-1120 |

#shands extension

Shandscair 50300

Neurorads 30509

NeuroIR pager 413-5512

Overnight radiology reading room 30894

General pager 413-2965

Consult pager:413-1234

Stroke pager: 413-6801

VA pager: 413-8379

VA neuro office: 352-374-6082

DBS interrogator password: florida1

Fax to upload records into patient's chart: 352-627-4371.

Meds to beds north tower 352-682-8221

Meds to beds east and south 352-642-2849

Wound care: 642-6100 (Leave a message if not there)

MRI North tower: 45424

MRI East tower: 30507

MRI South tower: 30857

CT South tower: 30895
